values.value: Tests MDQ regular quantity decrease. Enriches each row with effQty and headroom arrays; picks Product A (must have positive min-headroom across all segments) and Product B (prefer different row with headroom at idxB, falls back to same row). Steps: (1) Year-1 propagation with adaptive delta, (2) optional floor-aware propagation (non-Y1 segments pin at priorQty while Y1 continues), (3) Year-N isolation, (4) set to priorQty → Eff. Qty shows 0, (5) type below priorQty → clamped, (6) save + DB verify. Skips if no MDQ row has positive headroom. 3 scenarios.
